member.name: T:TestLib.Models.User
member.summary: Represents a user in the system.
member.remarks: Users are identified by their unique Id property.

member.name: P:TestLib.Models.User.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:TestLib.Models.User.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's display name.

member.name: M:TestLib.Models.User.GetDisplayName
member.returns: A string containing the display name.

member.name: T:TestLib.Models.Role
member.summary: Represents a role that can be assigned to users.

member.name: P:TestLib.Models.Role.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the role name.

member.name: T:TestLib.Services.UserService
member.remarks: This service handles CRUD operations for users.

member.name: M:TestLib.Services.UserService.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a user by their identifier.
member.returns: The user if found, null otherwise.

member.name: M:TestLib.Services.UserService.Search(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Searches for users matching the given query.
member.param: Maximum number of results to return.

member.name: E:TestLib.Services.UserService.UserCreated
member.summary: Raised when a new user is created.
